chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Misc. Appeal No. 57 of 2025 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge 1.For order on CMA No.9506/2025 (urgent) 2.For order on CMA No.9117/2025 3.For order on office objection 4.For hearing of main case 30.12.2025 Mr. Sanwal Thahim, advocate for appellant Mr. Muhammad Kamran, AAG......... 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Appellant Khan Muhammad is present. Muhammad Zareef is also present, who is Honorary Secretary of the Respondent No.1 and duly authorized by the Respondent No.1, as per the Resolution dated 07.12.2025 (available on file along with CMA No.9117/2025). The parties hereby state that the matter has been compromised and therefore, instant Appeal may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. J U D G E Ashraf
